risks.title: False-green queue completion
risks.detail: Scheduler and runner can stop while Point B is still founder-incomplete.

risks.title: Silent under-escalation in self-repair
risks.detail: Current executor policy stops earlier than founder doctrine requires.

risks.title: Receipt truth lag
risks.detail: Receipts can remain fresh-looking while no longer describing the current live truth.

risks.title: Legacy authority bleed
risks.detail: Cold agents can still confuse Hist-owned artifacts with active orchestration.

risks.title: Blueprint comparison skipped
risks.detail: If architect comparison is skipped, execution may freeze drift into law.
